---
title: "ANOVA"
subtitle: "Assesment Quiz"
author: "Andrew Seaman"
date: "2025-Aug-4"
output: 
  html_document:
    theme: journal
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    code_folding: hide
---

<!-- ------ -->
<!-- SETUP: -->
<!-- ------ -->

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, include=FALSE}
# Load libraries
library(mosaic)
library(DT)
library(pander)
library(tidyverse)
```

<!-- Setup End -->








<!-- ---------- -->
<!-- QUESTIONS: -->
<!-- ---------- -->

## 1.

<!-- Q1. End -->










## 2.

```{r}
feet.aov <-  aov(length ~ domhand + sex + domhand:sex, data=KidsFeet)

summary(feet.aov)
```

<!-- Q2. End -->










## 3.

```{r}
boys <- KidsFeet[KidsFeet$sex == "B" & KidsFeet$domhand == "L", ]
mean(boys$length)
```

<!-- Q3. End -->



<!-- Questions End -->



<!-- -------- -->
<!-- FILE END -->
<!-- -------- -->
